releaseNotes:
• Fix: EPG channel assignments (the "which EPG feed entry matches this channel" link) are now preserved when you refresh a source. Previously every source refresh erased all EPG matches, requiring a full re-match afterwards.
• Fix: "Refresh EPG now" incorrectly showed a "0 programs loaded" warning even when hundreds of thousands of programs were loaded successfully.
• Fix: "Re-match all channels" could stall at "Starting…" immediately after running "Refresh EPG now" in the same session.
